title: Security and deployment readiness pass
scope: Added a security/deployment readiness gate for shared and pilot environments.
Readiness checks cover API auth, Command Center auth, CORS, remote storage, KMS signing, and shared-demo storage boundaries.
Added text and JSON readiness output modes.
Added readiness documentation with stop rules and verification evidence.
Added regression tests for blocked local defaults, shared-demo boundaries, pilot-ready settings, and report output.
acceptance: Local/default settings are blocked for shared deployment.
Pilot-ready settings pass only when auth, CORS, remote storage, and KMS signing are configured.
Shared-demo storage is explicitly prevented from being treated as immutable evidence.
Stop boundaries are documented for credentials, production, cloud changes, storage, signing, and claim expansion.
